reason: Parent shared requirements: single consent flag, privacy red-lines (no content ever), dependency budget. This child owns the shared toggle + flag both tools reuse.
Non-obvious macOS HID + TCC + codesign/Info.plist gotchas — needed because instrumentation touches AppDelegate/KeyMonitor launch paths and adds an Info.plist key + a new signed SPM dependency.

Build/test conventions (standalone swiftc runners + Makefile test-all), .xcstrings append-only rule, UserDefaults-per-component settings pattern, single-import-boundary/singleton conventions this task must follow.
